mapper.select: SELECT id, holiday_date, holiday_type, reason, applies_to_language, created_by_staff_id, created_at, updated_at FROM store_holidays WHERE holiday_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND ( #{appliesToLanguage} IS NULL OR applies_to_language IS NULL OR applies_to_language = #{appliesToLanguage} ) ORDER BY holiday_date ASC
SELECT id, holiday_date, holiday_type, reason, applies_to_language, created_by_staff_id, created_at, updated_at FROM store_holidays WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, holiday_date, holiday_type, reason, applies_to_language, created_by_staff_id, created_at, updated_at FROM store_holidays WHERE holiday_date = #{holidayDate} AND ((applies_to_language IS NULL AND #{appliesToLanguage} IS NULL) OR applies_to_language = #{appliesToLanguage}) LIMIT 1
SELECT id, holiday_date, holiday_type, reason, applies_to_language, created_by_staff_id, created_at, updated_at FROM store_holidays WHERE holiday_date = #{holidayDate} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM store_holidays WHERE holiday_date = #{holidayDate} AND holiday_type = 'CLOSED' AND (applies_to_language IS NULL OR applies_to_language = #{appliesToLanguage}) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store_holidays ( holiday_date, holiday_type, reason, applies_to_language, created_by_staff_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{holidayDate}, #{holidayType}, #{reason}, #{appliesToLanguage}, #{createdByStaffId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE store_holidays SET holiday_date = #{holidayDate}, holiday_type = #{holidayType}, reason = #{reason}, applies_to_language = #{appliesToLanguage}, created_by_staff_id = #{createdByStaffId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
